1.premise: Military dominance makes learning other languages unnecessary for Americans.
An Asian comic reassuring the crowd about speaking English implies a language barrier, but reveals the Super Bowl halftime show was too Spanish.

2.premise: Having the world's biggest military arsenal could make learning a second language pointless.

1.premise: Deporting Mexicans to reduce crime is widely understood to miss the actual demographic responsible for muggings.
A Black man doing yard work could be reframed as unnecessary labor given modern options like retail theft.
Working out could be reframed as needing to outlast a Black mugger only long enough for police to arrive.

lines.text: Hey!
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: What's up Houston?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Oh yeah. Don't worry, I speak English.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: This isn't the Super Bowl halftime show.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: If I wanted to hear a bunch of Spanish, I'd go to a kitchen at Chili's.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Stop trying to make me learn things. This is America.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: What's the point of having all these bombs if I have to learn?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I do think it's fucked up that a lot of Mexicans are getting deported.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I think if you're trying to reduce crime,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Deporting Mexicans is the least efficient way to do that.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I've never been walking down a dark alley
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and heard the voice behind me be like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Give me your money."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's usually some form of Ebonics.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: The language of robberies.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yeah, I recently saw a black guy gardening.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was like, "Dude, you don't have to do that anymore."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You can do larceny and retail theft as well now.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I am working out right now.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You know, I don't have to be stronger than a black guy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I just have to last long enough 'til the cops get there.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: All right, well, that's my tie.
lines.label: fluff
